# Fyn developer context

- [MCP quickstart](https://fynfyn.top/llms-full.txt#mcp-quickstart)
- [OpenAPI description](https://fynfyn.top/openapi.json)
- [Authentication](https://fynfyn.top/auth.md)
- [MCP server card](https://fynfyn.top/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json)
- [Source repository](https://github.com/AlejandroMI/fyn)

The production service exposes a public, rate-limited Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint at `https://fynfyn.top/mcp`. No authentication is currently required. The only tool is `search_properties`.
